properties.titulo_evento: Chinese ballistic missile test is said to undermine nuclear weapons-free zone in South Pacific
properties.descricao: China has repeatedly called out the AUKUS nuclear submarine deal between Australia, the U.S. and the U.K. as violating the treaty.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany set to become first international site for ATACMS missile production
properties.descricao: The move addresses a bottleneck, as Lockheed Martin has been winding down ATACMS output at its Camden, Arkansas, site while prioritizing newer missiles.

properties.titulo_evento: Thales to buy French underwater-drone maker Exail in $4.5 billion deal
properties.descricao: Industry champions in France and Italy move to consolidate their positions in a growing market for unmanned underwater naval equipment.

properties.titulo_evento: Russian strikes kill 20, exposing Ukraine’s air-defense shortage
properties.descricao: President Volodymyr Zelenskyy has repeatedly pleaded for more interceptors — the only weapon in its arsenal that can shoot down ballistic projectiles.

properties.titulo_evento: Gathering Clouds: Building Digital Strategic Depth in the Compute Age
properties.descricao: The wars in Ukraine and the Middle East have exposed a strategic reality that military planners are only beginning to confront: In a data-centric age, digital infrastructure has become part of the battlespace. Data centers and cloud regions are no...

properties.titulo_evento: Ukrainian Writers Take Aim at Government Narratives
properties.descricao: Welcome to The Ukraine Compass, a weekly digest of Ukrainian commentary and analysis from across the political spectrum only for War on the Rocks members. Each Monday, we bring you a curated selection of articles from Ukrainian medi...

properties.titulo_evento: Trump criticises NATO allies over Iran conflict support
properties.descricao: US President Donald Trump criticised NATO allies for refusing to back the United States during its conflict with Iran.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump says will lift sanctions on Turkiye, ‘consider’ selling F-35s
properties.descricao: Announcement during Ankara meeting suggests pivot in US policy, despite opposition from Israel.

properties.titulo_evento: Christians are not united for Israel
properties.descricao: The Christian Zionist narrative linking faith to support for Israel is deeply flawed. Evangelicals have begun to see it.

properties.titulo_evento: Nigel Farage resigns as MP, will run in UK by-election
properties.descricao: Reform UK leader Nigel Farage says he will resign as an MP to trigger a by-election and stand again.

properties.titulo_evento: Displaced Gaza farmers turn to dirt near tents to grow crops
properties.descricao: Israel has devastated 95 percent of Gaza's farms, engineering starvation and aid dependency, experts warn.

properties.titulo_evento: Woman suspected of Monaco bomb attack found dead in Ukraine
properties.descricao: Police had been hunting Anastasiia Berezovska after a Ukrainian millionaire was injured in the blast.

properties.titulo_evento: From 'a beautiful night' to 'world's greatest hangover', guests react to Taylor and Travis's wedding
properties.descricao: Some of the famous guests have been posting on social media about the big day in New York.

properties.titulo_evento: Woman suspected of Monaco bombing is found dead in Ukraine, authorities say
properties.descricao: The woman suspected of trying to kill a Ukrainian business tycoon in a bombing attack in Monaco last week was found dead in Ukraine with gunshot wounds to the head, Ukraine’s Security Service said on Tuesday. FRANCE 24's Morgan Ayre reports.

properties.titulo_evento: France's Le Pen says still running for president, despite embezzlement conviction confirmed
properties.descricao: French far-right chief Marine Le Pen Tuesday said she was still standing for president next year, after an appeals court confirmed her embezzlement conviction but paved the way for her to run with a shorter ban from office. FRANCE 24's Mark Owen spe...

properties.titulo_evento: France: Le Pen vows to run despite upheld graft conviction
properties.descricao: After a court appeal rendered her eligible in theory to run while wearing an ankle tag, the far-right leader says she intends to stand next year. She repeated her plan to appeal again, saying the tag may not be needed.

properties.titulo_evento: How drones transformed Iran's Axis of Resistance militias in Lebanon, Gaza, Yemen and Iraq
properties.descricao: Drone production, technology transfer and training have enabled Iran's regional allies to operate with far greater independence. Has this network become too resilient to be dismantled through military strikes?

properties.titulo_evento: UK: Nigel Farage resigns as MP, to run again in by-election
properties.descricao: The best way to deal with growing scrutiny over undeclared financial support is to step down ... and stand again. That's the conclusion Reform UK leader Nigel Farage has come to by forcing a by-election.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine: Suspect in Monaco bomb attack found dead near Kyiv
properties.descricao: Ukrainain prosecutors say the body of the woman suspected of the bombing that targeted businessman Vadym Yermolaiev was found near Kyiv. Police said they had detained two individuals suspected of murdering her.

properties.titulo_evento: China's missile test builds on Pacific nuclear deterrence
properties.descricao: US allies in the Pacific condemned what Beijing has called a "routine" intercontinental ballistic missile test, which comes as China seeks to demonstrate its growing military capabilities.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany: Record debt and a seismic policy shift
properties.descricao: The German government's draft budget for 2027 includes more money for the military and less for everything else, while debt continues to grow rapidly.

properties.titulo_evento: Canada awards Germany major submarine contract
properties.descricao: Canadian PM Carney said the deal of up to 12 German-built submarines will be the "largest in Canadian history." Germany had pushed hard for the order, which comes as Canada seeks stronger ties with Europe.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump rips NATO allies, dashing European hopes for a kumbaya summit
properties.descricao: But the president praised Turkey and again floated the idea of selling Ankara advanced fighter jets, even as he aired old complaints about Greenland, Ukraine and European energy policy.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran’s Strikes on Ships in Strait of Hormuz Test Cease-Fire and Threaten Oil Flow
properties.descricao: The latest attacks, just weeks after the United States and Iran agreed to try to negotiate a lasting end to their hostilities, highlight risks for shipping companies.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump’s World Cup Intervention Roils the Soccer World, and Beyond
properties.descricao: The U.S.-Belgium soccer game is turning out to be a huge deal even before it kicks off on Monday, thrusting politics into the spotlight.
